def solve(nums)
  sorted = nums.map(&:abs).sort
  n = sorted.length
  count = 0
  (0...n-1).each do |i|
    target = 2 * sorted[i]
    low = i + 1
    high = n - 1
    res = i
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) / 2
      if sorted[mid] <= target
        res = mid
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    count += (res - i)
  end
  count
end

  sorted = nums.map(&:abs).sort
  n = sorted.length

    low = i + 1

      if sorted[mid] <= target

      end
    end
    count += (res - i)
  end
  count
end
